subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of love! Every comfort shall be transformed into hardship, and every honor shall culminate in abasement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار عشق هر راحتی مبدل بزحمت گردد و هر عزتی منتهی بذلت تاج کوهر
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
